name: GAP-KELIM-SIM
verbatim_evidence: KB claim: KELIM convergence model trained on N=500 SIMULATED (MC seed 42), 0 real patients; Model4 AUROC 0.828 but uplift +0.000 vs additive, -0.002 vs KELIM-only. Coeffs kelim_k=-3.2202 etc = sim, not fit
Zeta dataset: SAS PDS trials with serial CA-125 / tumor-marker kinetics (ador/adef/adlb series) — analog to KELIM value path

attributes.role: TRAIN (real serial-marker kinetics to replace simulated betas)
attributes.how: PDS longitudinal marker series enable real KELIM-style kinetic modeling with actual outcomes, replacing the MC-seeded convergence betas. Only if a trial has CA-125-equivalent serial markers + platinum-type outcome.
attributes.blocker: PDS is pan-cancer; need to locate ovarian/serial-CA125 trial. KELIM value path (Lyon API) already works; this targets the SIM convergence betas only.
attributes.closes_gap: PARTIAL - real serial-marker training feasible if matching trial identified
attributes.zeta_dataset: SAS PDS trials with serial CA-125 / tumor-marker kinetics (ador/adef/adlb series) — analog to KELIM value path
attributes.kb_claim: KELIM convergence model trained on N=500 SIMULATED (MC seed 42), 0 real patients; Model4 AUROC 0.828 but uplift +0.000 vs additive, -0.002 vs KELIM-only. Coeffs kelim_k=-3.2202 etc = sim, not fit
